name: call_device_function
description: Remotely invoke a function exposed by device firmware. You pass a string argument (up to 622 characters) and receive an integer return value. Use get_device_info first to see which functions a device exposes.

parameters.name: deviceId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the device.

parameters.name: functionName
parameters.description: The name of the function to call, as exposed by the device firmware.

parameters.name: arg
parameters.description: A string argument to pass to the function. Max 622 characters.
